title: Oh, What a Week—Mendoza Makes Her Move

statements.summary: Mendoza's campaign ad mentions rising property taxes as a problem but does not state her specific policy on TIF reform.
statements.quote: Families are being squeezed by rising rents, higher fees and property taxes.

statements.summary: Mendoza's campaign ad mentions rising rents as a problem but does not state a specific policy to address affordable housing funding.
statements.quote: Families are being squeezed by rising rents, higher fees and property taxes.
